inputs.challenge: My mother is in early-stage dementia and forgets who I am two visits out of five.
inputs.core_difficulty: I am grieving someone who is still alive.

inputs.challenge: My brother and I have not spoken in three years after our father's will.
inputs.core_difficulty: Neither of us wants to be the one who reaches out first.

inputs.challenge: My wife and I share a house but not a conversation since the kids moved out.
inputs.core_difficulty: We have forgotten how to be curious about each other.

inputs.challenge: My manager publicly takes credit for my work and undermines me privately.
inputs.core_difficulty: Speaking up risks my visa; staying silent corrodes my self-respect.

inputs.challenge: My 28-year-old daughter has not called me in six months. She blocks my number after every disagreement.
inputs.core_difficulty: I do not know what I am supposed to have done.

inputs.challenge: मेरी सास और मेरे बीच बात-बात पर तनाव रहता है
inputs.core_difficulty: मेरे पति हमेशा अपनी माँ का पक्ष लेते हैं

inputs.challenge: My best friend just sold her startup for a number that makes me feel small.
inputs.core_difficulty: I want to be happy for her and I cannot quite get there.

inputs.challenge: I do not know who to talk to anymore.
